name: Kobelco Eco-Solutions Co., Ltd.
summary: Kobelco Eco-Solutions Co., Ltd. provides general environmental solutions in Japan. The company is involved in the designing, manufacturing, and selling of water treatment equipment and facilities for industrial water, city water, and sewage; treatment facilities for ultrapure water, pure water, industrial water, and wastewater; biomass recycling systems for organic waste, such as sewage sludge and food; and cooling towers, including industrial/air conditioning cooling towers. It also designs, manufactures, sells, and repairs equipment and facilities, such as municipal waste incineration/melting facilities; PCB waste treatment facilities; and wood biomass-fired power plants. In addition, the company designs, manufactures, sells, and repairs process equipment, including glasslined reactors, polymerizers, reactors, evaporators, and mixers/dryers; and high-purity hydrogen/oxygen generators. Further, it is involved in the technological development and environmental analysis service activities. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan. Kobelco Eco-Solutions Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Kobe Steel, Ltd.
